---
title: "investr: An R Package for Inverse Estimation"
---

The package vignette is the original *R Journal* article, [investr: An R
Package for Inverse Estimation](https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2014-009)
(Greenwell and Schubert Kabban, 2014), which is distributed with the package
in its original PDF form. It is embedded below; you can also
[download the PDF directly](introduction.pdf) or read the
[published version](https://journal.r-project.org/articles/RJ-2014-009/index.html)
on the R Journal website. In R, use `vignette("introduction", package = "investr")`.

<iframe src="introduction.pdf" width="100%" height="800" style="border: none;">
  This browser does not support embedded PDFs; you can
  <a href="introduction.pdf">download the PDF</a> instead.
</iframe>
